opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every time I eat, it feels like a heavy brick is sitting right under my ribs, and the burning is keeping me awake at night. It's been building for a few weeks but it got much worse after a big dinner last night. I'm a bit scared because it's so high up, near my chest.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The burning and the bloated, over-full feeling after meals got a lot worse in the last day, and the antacid tablets I bought from the chemist aren't really helping.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 4 weeks ago it started as mild fullness after meals; it became a lot worse over the last 24 hours after a large evening meal
symptom_narrative.duration: 4 weeks in total, and acutely worse for about a day
symptom_narrative.character: a burning feeling high in the middle of my tummy, plus a heavy full feeling like I can't finish a meal, with a lot of bloating and burping
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: uncomfortable and keeping me awake, but I can still get up and move around and do my usual things
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high in the middle of my tummy, just under the ribs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst about 30 to 60 minutes after eating, especially after a big meal
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: the antacid tablets take a tiny bit of the edge off, but not much

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: over-the-counter peppermint antacid tablets bought from the chemist

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; feeling quite anxious because the discomfort is so high up near the chest, and the poor sleep is wearing me down

objective_data_offered.value: on video looks mildly uncomfortable and keeps rubbing the upper tummy; no yellowing of the eyes or skin that I can see
I have not vomited and there has been no blood or coffee-ground looking material; my bowel motions look normal to me, not black or tarry
no trouble swallowing food or drink, and I have not lost any weight without trying
